headline: Regions Bank Ranked No. 1 in JD Power 2026 U.S. Online Banking Satisfaction Study
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., May 28, 2026--Regions Bank on Thursday announced it has again ranked No. 1* among regional banks in the JD Power 2026 U.S. Online Banking Satisfaction Study SM, marking the sixth time in the past seven years Regions has earned the top designation. Additionally, Regions ranked No. 2 among regional banks in the JD Power 2026 U.S. Banking Mobile App Satisfaction Study SM, improving by four spots from the prior year. thumbnail.caption: This recognition from JD Power underscores Regions Bank's relentless focus on delivering high-quality, intuitive digital experiences for customers.
